input.user_input: What is the auto-renewal language in this SaaS subscription agreement, and how much notice is needed to cancel?

actual: I do not have access to the SaaS subscription agreement you are referring to. Please upload or provide the text of the agreement, and I will gladly review it to extract the auto-renewal language and the required cancellation notice period for you.
